{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Sandviper heir
| introduced = Soulsmith
}}

== Soulsmith ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Kral]] is the [[Sandviper heir]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c13">''Soulsmith'', chapter 13</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Soulsmith]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
